sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 1:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 1:1
items.html: The records of SAG connected with the records of the inner MA and BON. This caused a new restriction at the point of phase two. (Inner Light, Item 7)
